dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1500 Power for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Skirmisher's Versatility
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal Combat Advantage damage with your powers, you have a 10% chance to increase one of the following stats by 8% for 10 seconds: Accuracy, Combat Advantage, Critical Avoidance, or Deflect Severity. (30 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 5% Defense for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Haste
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1% Recharge Speed for each enemy you are engaged in battle within 100'. Max 10 Stacks: 10% Recharge Speed.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Reckless Advantage
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy gain a stack of Reckless Advantage, increasing your Combat Advantage by 2% but decreasing your Critical Avoidance by 1.5% for 5 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 5% Defense for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Skirmisher's Versatility
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal Combat Advantage damage with your powers, you have a 10% chance to increase one of the following stats by 8% for 10 seconds: Accuracy, Combat Advantage, Critical Avoidance, or Deflect Severity. (30 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Remedy
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, you have a 10% chance to restore 5% of your Maximum Hit Points. This effect may only occur once every 5 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Vital Onslaught
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, your next three strikes from encounter powers will deal 15% more damage and heal you for 1% of your Max HP. This power expires when combat ends. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Battle-Hardened Resolve
dbEquipBonuses.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Forte is increased by +1.8% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or fewer enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 6% Forte

dbEquipBonuses.name: Reactive Shielding
dbEquipBonuses.description: On dmg > 15% MaxHP: 20' aura gives allies +1% Defense and +2.5% IH 8s (15s cd)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1000 Defense for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Devil Hunter
dbEquipBonuses.description: +1% Damage against Devils

dbEquipBonuses.name: Boar's Determination
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 7.5% Awareness and 5% Stamina Regeneration for 10 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Ruthless Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1.5% Critical Strike and Critical Severity for 15 seconds. Max 5 Stacks: 7.5% Critical Strike and Critical Severity

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1000 Defense for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Devil Hunter
dbEquipBonuses.description: +1% Damage against Demons

dbEquipBonuses.name: Critical Remedy
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to restore 5% of your Maximum Hit Points. This effect may only occur once every 5 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Leader's Power
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 1000 Power and Combat Advantage for each player in your team.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Defense
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 5% Defense for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Reckless Advantage
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy gain a stack of Reckless Advantage, increasing your Combat Advantage by 3% but decreasing your Critical Avoidance by 1% for 5 seconds. (Max 6 stacks)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Ruthless Advantage
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1.5% Accuracy and Combat Advantage for 15 seconds. Max 5 Stack: 7.5% Accuracy and Combat Advantage

dbEquipBonuses.name: Maiden's Blade
dbEquipBonuses.description: You do 6% more damage to enemies that are not facing you. This bonus doubles in the Underdark.
